---
title: "From pixels to patterns"
format:
  html:
    css: css/styles.css  
    embed-resources: true
    code-tools: true
    
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: false
---

## Packages and data

```{r}
invisible(Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "C"))
if (!dir.exists("../output")) {
  dir.create("../output")
}
invisible(lapply(c("tidyverse", "lubridate", "ade4", "piecewiseSEM", "performance", "patchwork", "slider", "kableExtra", "phylopath", "e1071", "nlme", "zoo"),require,character.only = TRUE))

position_palette <- c("A" = "#385438", "B" = "#609060", "C" = "#a8c090")
season_palette <- c('autumn' = '#CA7842', "summer" = "#DDA853", 'winter' = '#8ACCD5', "spring" = "#A4B465" )

# Fauna data
data_sem_raw <- read.csv("../output/SEM_database.csv", sep = ",", na.strings = c("", "NA"))%>%
  mutate("hum" = hum_soil,
         "temp" = temp_soil,
         "root" = root_cm2_count,
         "fauna" = all_taxa,
         position=as.factor(position))
data_sem_raw$date <- ymd_hms(data_sem_raw$date, tz = "UTC")

# taxa list 
fauna_vars <- readLines("../output/fauna_vars.txt")

# microclimate index 
microclimate_index <- readLines("../output/microclimate_index.txt")

# transformation
data_sem_raw <- data_sem_raw %>% mutate(across(all_of(c(fauna_vars, "root")), ~ ifelse(!is.na(.), sqrt(.)+sqrt(.+1), .)),  across(where(is.numeric), ~ as.numeric(scale(.))))
```

## SEM modelisation

```{r}
# Function to generate rolling windows for a given dataset:
create_rolling_windows <- function(df, window_days, step_days) {
  start_dates <- seq(
    min(df$date),
    max(df$date) - days(window_days) + hours(6),
    by = paste(step_days, "days")
  )
  
  # Subset data for each window
  windows <- map(start_dates, function(start_dt) {
    df %>% filter(date >= start_dt & date < start_dt + days(window_days))
  })
  
  # Name each window by its start date
  names(windows) <- format(start_dates, "%Y-%m-%d")
  windows
}

run_sem_for_taxon <- function(taxon_var,
                              data_indices,
                              microclimate_index,
                              window_days = window_days,
                              step_days   = step_days,
                              missing_data_rate = missing_data_rate) {

  message("Running SEM for taxon: ", taxon_var)

  # Préparer les données SEM
  data_sem <- data_indices %>%
    mutate(
      fauna = !!sym(taxon_var),
      microclimate_index_1 = !!sym(microclimate_index[1]),
      microclimate_index_2 = !!sym(microclimate_index[2])
    ) %>%
    select(date, position, orientation, depth,
           fauna, root,
           microclimate_index_1, microclimate_index_2) %>%
    mutate(depth = as.factor(depth))

  # Rolling windows par position
  windows_list <- data_sem %>%
    group_by(position) %>%
    group_map(~ create_rolling_windows(.x, window_days, step_days),
              .keep = TRUE)

  names(windows_list) <- unique(data_sem$position)

  # SEM structure
  sem_fit <- function(data) {
    psem(
      lme(root ~ microclimate_index_1 + microclimate_index_2,
          data = data,
          random = ~1 | orientation/depth,
          correlation = corAR1(form = ~1 | orientation/depth)),

      lme(fauna ~ microclimate_index_1 + microclimate_index_2 + root,
          data = data,
          random = ~1 | orientation/depth,
          correlation = corAR1(form = ~1 | orientation/depth)),

      microclimate_index_1 %~~% microclimate_index_2
    )
  }

  # Stockage
  results_list <- list()

  for (pos in names(windows_list)) {
    for (window_name in names(windows_list[[pos]])) {

      data_window <- windows_list[[pos]][[window_name]] %>%
        drop_na()

      if (nrow(data_window) / (window_days * 16) < missing_data_rate) next

      mod <- tryCatch(
        sem_fit(data_window),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )

      if (!is.null(mod)) {
        results_list[[paste(taxon_var, pos, window_name, sep = "_")]] <-
          list(
            model = mod,
            time_window_start = window_name,
            position = pos
          )
      }
    }
  }

  if (length(results_list) == 0) return(NULL)

  # Extraction des estimates
  extract_results <- function(model_name, model_info) {

    sm <- summary(model_info$model)
    coef_table <- as.data.frame(sm$coefficients)

    p_clean <- coef_table$P.Value %>%
      as.character() %>%
      stringr::str_replace("<", "") %>%
      as.numeric()

    tibble(
      model            = model_name,
      taxon            = taxon_var,
      position         = model_info$position,
      time_window_start = model_info$time_window_start,
      response         = coef_table$Response,
      predictor        = coef_table$Predictor,
      estimate         = coef_table$Estimate,
      se               = coef_table$Std.Error,
      df               = coef_table$DF,
      t_value          = coef_table$t.value,
      p_value          = p_clean
    )
  }

  map2_dfr(
    names(results_list),
    results_list,
    extract_results
  ) %>%
    mutate(time_step = as.POSIXct(time_window_start,
                                  format = "%Y-%m-%d",
                                  tz = "UTC"))
}
```

```{r}
window_days <- 14       
step_days   <- 1      
missing_data_rate <- 0.3

results_all_taxa <- purrr::map_dfr(
  fauna_vars,
  run_sem_for_taxon,
  data_indices = data_sem_raw,
  microclimate_index = microclimate_index,
  window_days = window_days,
  step_days   = step_days,
  missing_data_rate = missing_data_rate)
```

## Graphics

### hypothesis about the global environmental force according system considered

```{r}
alpha_level <- 0.05

data_plot <- results_all_taxa %>%
  filter(response == "fauna",
         !str_detect(predictor, "~~")) %>%
  mutate(
    significant = p_value < alpha_level,
    alpha_sig = ifelse(significant, 1, 0.2)
  )
```

```{r}
stats <- data_plot %>%
   group_by(position, predictor) %>%
   reframe(
     mean = mean(estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
     variance = var(estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
     skewness = skewness(estimate, na.rm = TRUE),
     kurtosis = kurtosis(estimate, na.rm = TRUE))
ggplot(data_plot, aes(estimate, fill = position))+
     geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.1)+
     scale_fill_manual(values = position_palette) +
     facet_grid(position ~ predictor, scale ="free")+
     geom_text(data = stats,aes(x = Inf - 1, y = Inf,
                                label = sprintf("moy=%.2f\nvar=%.2f\nskew=%.2f\nkurt=%.2f", mean, variance, skewness, kurtosis)),
               hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 3, color = "black",
               inherit.aes = FALSE) +
     theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
plot_one_taxon <- function(df, taxon_name) {
  ggplot(df, aes(
    x = time_step,
    y = estimate,
    color = position,
    alpha = alpha_sig
  )) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = position_palette) +
    scale_alpha_identity() +
    facet_grid(
      position + predictor ~ .,
      scales = "free",
      labeller = labeller(
        predictor = label_wrap_gen(20)
      )
    ) +
    scale_x_datetime(
      date_labels = "%b %Y",
      date_breaks = "1 month"
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Date",
      y = "SEM estimate",
      color = "Position",
      title = paste("Temporal variation of SEM estimates –", taxon_name),
      subtitle = "Point opacity indicates statistical significance (p < 0.05)"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}


plots_by_taxon <- data_plot %>%
  split(.$taxon) %>%
  imap(~ plot_one_taxon(.x, .y))

```

```{r}
data_plot %>%
  group_by(taxon, predictor, position)%>%
  reframe(estimate = mean(estimate))%>%
  ggplot(aes(estimate, taxon, group = position, fill = position))+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "orange", linewidth = 0.5)+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge())+
  facet_grid(~predictor) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = position_palette)+
  theme_minimal()
```

time variation

```{r}
alpha_level <- 0.05

g_estimates_time <- results_all_taxa %>%
  filter(response == "fauna",
    !str_detect(predictor, "~~")) %>%
  mutate(significant = p_value < alpha_level,
    alpha_sig = ifelse(significant, 1, 0.2))%>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time_step,y = estimate, color = position,alpha = alpha_sig)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +

  scale_color_manual(values = position_palette) +
  scale_alpha_identity() +
  facet_grid(
    position + predictor ~ taxon,
    scales = "free",
    labeller = labeller(
      predictor = label_wrap_gen(20),
      taxon = label_wrap_gen(15))) +
  scale_x_datetime(
    date_labels = "%b %Y",
    date_breaks = "1 month"
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Date",
    y = "SEM estimate",
    color = "Position",
    title = "Temporal variation of SEM estimates (fauna response)",
    subtitle = "Point opacity indicates statistical significance (p < 0.05)"
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 8),
    legend.position = "bottom")

g_estimates_time


```

```{r}
data_plot %>% 
  mutate(month = floor_date(time_step, "month"))%>%
  group_by(predictor, position, month) %>% 
  reframe(estimate = mean(estimate))%>%
  ggplot(aes(month, estimate, fill = position))+
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge())+
  scale_fill_manual(values = position_palette)+
  facet_grid(~predictor)+
  theme_minimal()
```
